title: verbascum subserratum
intro: Verbascum subserratum, also known as the serrated mullein, is a perennial plant species within the mullein genus, characterized by its tall stature and unique serrated leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The serrated mullein has been found to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving lung function, and even exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum subserratum are often made into teas, infusions, or dried for later use, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal effects.
